data.body: [enwiki] Provisional government — /* Americas */ The Commission of Government of Newfoundland was most definitely a provisional government. The CoG was instated after a severe financial crisis, the great depression. Newfoundland was extremely close to defaulting on its debt; debt which it had acquired from the railway and WWI. I was surprised it wasn't included on this list, but I'm glad I can include it!
data.author: Rt. Hon. Chase W. Marrie
data.title: Provisional government
